user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Sorry to hear that. Can you describe what changed? | Customer: The back of the car has a dent now. It was not there before. | Support: Did anything else break or is it mostly body damage? | Customer: Mostly the rear bumper area. I attached the photo I took this morning.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The rear of the car is clearly visible in the image, allowing for a full inspection of the claimed bumper area.
claim_status_justification: The image shows severe damage to the rear of the car, including a completely missing rear bumper cover and a crushed trunk lid.

user_claim: Customer: Parking lot mein meri car ko scrape lag gaya. | Support: Aap kis type ka damage report karna chahte hain? | Customer: Front side par mark aa gaya hai, bumper ke upar. | Support: Light damage hai ya body par scratch? | Customer: Light theek hai, front bumper par scratch hai. Photos upload kar diye hain.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The front bumper is clearly visible in both images, allowing for a full inspection of the claimed scratch.
claim_status_justification: Image 1 clearly shows a dented and heavily scuffed front bumper near the headlight, supporting the user's claim of bumper damage.

user_claim: Customer: I am opening a claim for my windshield. | Support: What happened? | Customer: A small stone hit it while I was driving and now there is a crack spreading from that spot. | Support: Is the car otherwise okay? | Customer: Yes, this is only about the front glass. I added the pictures I have.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The front windshield is clearly visible in the images, allowing for a full inspection of the claimed crack.
claim_status_justification: Image 1 shows the front windshield is heavily shattered with a spiderweb cracking pattern, supporting the claim of windshield damage.

user_claim: Customer: Someone clipped my car while it was parked. | Support: What part was hit? | Customer: The side mirror got damaged. It is not sitting the way it should anymore. | Support: Was there any damage to the door too? | Customer: I did not notice anything else major, just the mirror.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The side mirror is clearly visible in the image, allowing for a full inspection of the claimed damage.
claim_status_justification: The image shows the passenger side mirror glass is completely shattered with spiderweb cracks, supporting the claim.

user_claim: Customer: I want to file this as bumper damage. | Support: Can you tell me what happened? | Customer: The car was tapped from behind and now the back looks damaged. | Support: Are you asking for review of the rear side? | Customer: Yes, the back bumper. It looks pretty bad to me, so I uploaded both photos.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The rear bumper and surrounding panels are visible in the images, allowing for inspection of the claimed bumper damage.
claim_status_justification: The user claims rear bumper damage, but Image 2 shows the rear bumper is completely undamaged. A dent is visible on the rear quarter panel in Image 1, but not on the bumper.

user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not fully sure how to explain this because I noticed it only after reaching home. | Support: No problem, please tell me what happened. | Customer: There was a small bump earlier, nothing major, and I first thought everything was fine. Later I looked at the car again because my family member said the front area looked different. | Support: Are you reporting a general vehicle issue or a specific damaged part? | Customer: I was confused at first because I checked the side and the front and walked around the car a few times. I do not want to claim the wrong thing. | Support: That is okay. What part do you want reviewed? | Customer: After checking again, I think the issue is with the headlight. It looks like the headlight may be cracked, so please review that part.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The submitted image only shows the side profile of the car; the claimed headlight is not visible.
claim_status_justification: The user claims headlight damage, but the submitted image does not show the front of the car or the headlights.

user_claim: Customer: There is a dent along the side of my car. | Support: When did you notice it? | Customer: This morning, after the car had been parked near the gate. | Support: Is it near the front or back? | Customer: It is on the door panel area. I attached two photos from different distances.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The side door panel is clearly visible in Image 2, allowing for a full inspection of the claimed dent.
claim_status_justification: Image 2 clearly shows a noticeable dent and surface scratches on the rear door panel, supporting the claim.

user_claim: Customer: I picked up my car after service and noticed a mark on the hood. | Support: What kind of mark is it? | Customer: It looks like a scratch across the top panel. | Support: Do you think it happened during service? | Customer: Yes, that is why I am asking for review. The photo is attached.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The hood is clearly visible in the image, allowing for a full inspection of the claimed scratch.
claim_status_justification: The user claims a minor scratch on the hood, but the image shows severe collision damage with a completely crumpled hood and destroyed front end.

user_claim: Customer: My laptop fell from the table yesterday. | Support: Is it turning on? | Customer: It turns on, but the display glass has a crack now. | Support: Are you reporting the screen only or the whole laptop? | Customer: The screen is the issue. I attached a photo of it open.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The laptop screen is clearly visible in the image, allowing for a full inspection of the claimed crack.
claim_status_justification: The image shows the laptop screen is completely shattered with an extensive spiderweb crack pattern, supporting the claim.

user_claim: Customer: The laptop no longer opens smoothly. | Support: What seems to be wrong mechanically? | Customer: The hinge area has broken and the screen wobbles. | Support: Did this happen after a drop? | Customer: Yes, it slipped from the sofa. I uploaded photos from the outside and side.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The hinge area is clearly visible in Image 1, allowing for a full inspection of the claimed damage.
claim_status_justification: Image 1 shows the plastic bezel surrounding the screen is broken and detached near the left hinge, supporting the claim.

user_claim: Customer: I spilled water near my laptop while working. | Support: What part was affected? | Customer: It went over the keys and left a stain. Some keys feel sticky now. | Support: Is the display damaged too? | Customer: No, this is about the keyboard area only.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The laptop keyboard is clearly visible and shows extensive liquid pooling.
claim_status_justification: The image clearly shows liquid pooling on the keyboard and palm rest, supporting the user's claim of a spill.

user_claim: Customer: My laptop bag fell from a chair and hit the floor. | Support: What damage did you notice? | Customer: One corner of the laptop has a dent now. | Support: Does the laptop still work? | Customer: It works, but the outer corner is damaged. I added two photos.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The laptop lid is clearly visible in the second image, showing a small sharp dent.
claim_status_justification: Image 2 shows a small, distinct puncture-style dent on the metal top lid of the laptop, supporting the claim.

user_claim: Customer: I am not sure if this should be a repair claim or a replacement claim, so I wanted to ask first. | Support: We can help. What device is this about? | Customer: It is my laptop. I carry it every day, and yesterday my bag got pressed between two seats during travel. At first I thought the laptop was okay because it still opened. | Support: What changed after that? | Customer: Later, while using it, I noticed marks on the display area. I restarted it twice because I thought it might just be something on the screen, but it still bothered me. | Support: Are you reporting keyboard, hinge, body, or screen damage? | Customer: Not the keyboard or hinge. The issue I want checked is the screen. It looks shattered to me, so I am submitting this as screen damage.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The laptop screen is clearly visible and shows extensive radiating cracks.
claim_status_justification: The image shows a prominent impact point with radiating cracks across the display screen, supporting the claim.

user_claim: Customer: The laptop trackpad has stopped working properly. | Support: Did anything happen before it stopped working? | Customer: The front area hit the desk edge when I moved it. | Support: Are you reporting internal function or physical damage? | Customer: Physical damage around the trackpad area. I attached the photo for review.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The trackpad is visible and shows a faint scratch highlighted by a circle.
claim_status_justification: The image shows a small scratch on the lower edge of the trackpad, which is highlighted by a white circle.

user_claim: Customer: My delivery box arrived damaged. | Support: What part of the package was affected? | Customer: One corner was crushed in when I received it. | Support: Is the item inside part of this claim? | Customer: Not right now. I am reporting the package corner damage.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The cardboard box corner is clearly visible and shows crushing.
claim_status_justification: The image shows the top corner of the shipping box is dented and slightly crushed, supporting the claim.

user_claim: Customer: Package receive hua toh opened jaisa lag raha tha. | Support: Tape broken tha ya box crush hua tha? | Customer: Seal wali side phati hui thi, jaise parcel khola gaya ho. | Support: Kya andar ka item missing hai? | Customer: Abhi item missing claim nahi kar raha, sirf torn packaging review karwana hai.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The cardboard box side is clearly visible in the first image, showing a significant tear along the seam.
claim_status_justification: Image 1 shows a significant tear along the taped seam of the cardboard box, exposing the interior gap.

user_claim: Customer: I received a package that looks water damaged. | Support: Was the item inside wet too? | Customer: I have not opened everything yet, but the outside has a wet-looking stain. | Support: So the claim is about the package condition? | Customer: Yes, the package surface looked damaged when it arrived.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The cardboard box side is clearly visible and shows a large liquid stain.
claim_status_justification: The image shows a large liquid stain and structural softening on one side of the cardboard shipping box.

user_claim: Customer: The item I ordered was not inside the box. | Support: Did the package look opened when you received it? | Customer: I checked it after delivery and could not find the product inside. | Support: What are you asking us to verify? | Customer: Please verify that the contents are missing from the package.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The interior of the open box is visible, but it is filled with protective packaging material, making it impossible to verify if the item is missing.
claim_status_justification: The open box is filled with crumpled newspaper, so the presence or absence of the actual item cannot be verified from the images.

user_claim: Customer: The shipping box arrived in bad condition. | Support: What kind of condition issue are you reporting? | Customer: It looked badly crushed when it was delivered. | Support: Is the claim about the outside box or the product inside? | Customer: The outside box. I want the crushed box reviewed.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The submitted image shows a metal food can instead of the claimed shipping package.
claim_status_justification: The user claimed a crushed shipping box, but the submitted image shows a dented metal food can, which is a completely different object.

user_claim: Customer: My delivery box arrived opened. | Support: Was the package crushed or was the seal affected? | Customer: The seal area looked torn when I received it. | Support: Are you asking us to review the package condition or the item inside? | Customer: The package condition. I want the torn-open package reviewed.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The cardboard box is visible and shows a torn corner and broken security tape.
claim_status_justification: Image 1 shows a cardboard box with a torn corner and broken security tape, supporting the claim that the seal area was torn.
